title: Al Khaja Holding
description: ***.com rocketreach.co/al-khaja-holding-profile_b451cc56fc778622 Al Khaja Holding is a prominent multi-business conglomerate based in the United Arab Emirates, originally established in 1969 as the Abu Dhabi Tyre Company.The group manages a diverse portfolio of investments across various sectors, including oil and gas, healthcare, pharmaceuticals, and retail distribution.Operating from its headquarters in Abu Dhabi, the holding company plays a significant role in the region's commercial landscape by overseeing its wide variety of subsidiary enterprises
